title: Step 2: Select  from the ellipsis menu to start archiving.

sections.heading: Required Access
sections.body:
To update, pause, or resume an online archive, you must have
[Project Data Access Admin](<Project Data Access Admin>) access or higher to the project.

sections.heading: Pause Archiving Through the Atlas CLI
sections.body:
To pause an online archive for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives pause <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters onlineArchives pause](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-pause).

sections.heading: Pausing and Resuming Through the API
sections.body:
To pause an active online archive or resume a paused online
archive through the API (Application Programming Interface), send a `PATCH` request to the
[onlineArchives](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-online-archive) endpoint with the
unique ID of the online archive to pause or resume. To learn more about
the syntax and options, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-updategroupclusteronlinearchive).

sections.heading: Pause Archiving Through the UI
sections.body:
To pause archiving, in your Atlas UI:

Click the ellipsis (`...`) in the Actions column for the online archive to display the list of allowed actions.
You can:

- Pause Archiving (only if state is Active)

- Edit Archive

- Delete Archive

- Resume Archiving (only if state is Paused)

sections.heading: Resume Archiving Through the Atlas CLI
sections.body:
To start a paused online archive for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives start <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters onlineArchives start](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-start).

sections.heading: Resume Archiving Through the UI
sections.body:
To resume archiving, in your Atlas UI:

Click the ellipsis (`...`) in the Actions column for the online archive to display the list of allowed actions.
You can:

- Pause Archiving (only if state is Active)

- Edit Archive

- Delete Archive

- Resume Archiving (only if state is Paused)

> **Note:** The Resume Archive option is only visible for
> online archives in Paused state.
